l1: This discipline is under active development — probing commands will be added by the Directory Services tech lead.
To contribute diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'dcdiag /test:replications /v' and share the output — this is the starting point for most AD DS issues.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced probing will be added by the Directory Services tech lead.
To contribute advanced diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'repadmin /showrepl * /csv > C:\repadmin.csv' and share — this covers AD replication health across all DCs.

l1: This discipline is under active development — troubleshooting steps will be added by the Directory Services tech lead.
To contribute resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Restart the Netlogon service: 'Restart-Service Netlogon' — resolves many transient AD authentication issues.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced troubleshooting will be added by the Directory Services tech lead.
To contribute advanced resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Force AD replication: 'repadmin /syncall /Adep' — synchronises all DCs and resolves most replication lag issues.

l1: This discipline is under active development — data collection steps will be added by the Directory Services tech lead.
To contribute data collection commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'dcdiag /v /f:C:\dcdiag.txt' — collects comprehensive DC health diagnostics for escalation.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced data collection will be added by the Directory Services tech lead.
To contribute advanced collection steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'repadmin /showrepl * /csv > C:\repadmin.csv' and 'netdom query fsmo > C:\fsmo.txt' — essential for L2 AD escalations.
